rationale: The cited paper studies whether company tweets/retweets causally increase TV show demand on Weibo, while the citing paper’s core contribution is a different question: how emotional expression in brand posts affects perceived brand status via norm/reference-group mechanisms. In the provided evidence, there is only a single DOI-level match and no in-text citation context indicating the cited study is used for theory, mechanism, method, or direct benchmarking. This looks most consistent with a background/literature mention rather than substantive dependence.
